mapper.select: SELECT * FROM org_member WHERE login_name = #{loginName} AND enabled = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM org_member WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND enabled = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM org_member WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND enabled = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY name

SELECT * FROM org_member WHERE enabled = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR login_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY name LIMIT 50
